evidence: During diff review, allowMissingLeaf realpath ENOENT handling could miss an existing dangling symlink/junction ancestor and continue to mkdir/write sinks. Added failing regression before fixing.

Pre-fix node --test tests/fileOps.test.js failed because the dangling junction path reached mkdir with ENOENT instead of policy rejection. Post-fix node --test tests/fileOps.test.js passed 9/9 and rejects the path with Path resolves outside compose project.

facts: Authenticated MCP path input to file write sink; intermediate code mishandled dangling symlink ENOENT, but final code lstat-checks and rejects existing symlink objects before ancestor fallback.
